text.title: Docker Language Templates Core Rules
text.summary: 6 testable rules including a `skip-this-methodology` rule. Each pairs a binary check with sourced rationale.

rule.statement: Template selection MUST match the implementation language; cross-language reuse rejected.
rule.rationale: Operational rationale tying the rule to the cited source.

rule.statement: Templates MUST embed non-root, HEALTHCHECK, multi-stage, .dockerignore by default; opting out requires documentation.
rule.rationale: Operational rationale tying the rule to the cited source.

rule.statement: Base image MUST be drawn from the org allowlist; arbitrary public images rejected.
rule.rationale: Operational rationale tying the rule to the cited source.

rule.statement: Template MUST expose port + health path explicitly; hidden defaults rejected.
rule.rationale: Operational rationale tying the rule to the cited source.

rule.statement: Templates MUST be semver-versioned in a shared repo; copy-paste deviation tracked.
rule.rationale: Operational rationale tying the rule to the cited source.

rule.statement: Skip when language outside catalogue OR existing Dockerfile already passes baselines.
rule.rationale: Operational rationale tying the rule to the cited source.
